hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】比特币矿工加速人工智能数据中心转型，Cipher Digital 第一季度亏损 1.14 亿美元；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗均声称控制霍尔木兹海峡；【FINANCE】Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞。

items.title: Cipher Digital loses $114 million in Q1 as bitcoin miner accelerates AI data center pivot
items.summary: The company has been pivoting from a pure-play mining model and toward leasing power and infrastructure to AI and cloud providers.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿工加速人工智能数据中心转型，Cipher Digital 第一季度亏损 1.14 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司一直在从纯粹的挖矿模式转向向人工智能和云提供商租赁电力和基础设施。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Both Claim Control Over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Ship traffic remains effectively frozen despite a U.S. initiative to protect vessels. The United Arab Emirates said its air defense systems had engaged missiles and drones from Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗均声称控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 尽管美国采取了保护船只的举措，但船舶交通实际上仍处于冻结状态。阿拉伯联合酋长国表示，其防空系统攻击了来自伊朗的导弹和无人机。

items.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
items.title_zh: Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 警告称，人工智能为软件公司、政府和银行修复数以万计的漏洞创造了一个狭窄的窗口。

items.title: Western Union’s Solana-based stablecoin could reshape its payment model, analyst says
items.summary: Western Union launched USDPT, a dollar-backed stablecoin on Solana, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, for 24/7 settlement with agents and partners.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，西联汇款基于 Solana 的稳定币可能会重塑其支付模式
items.summary_zh: 西联汇款在 Solana 上推出了 USDPT，这是一种由安克雷奇数字银行发行的美元支持的稳定币，与代理商和合作伙伴进行 24/7 结算。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant：更智能、更清晰、更个性化
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 即时更新 ChatGPT 的默认模型，提供更智能、更准确的答案、减少幻觉并改进个性化控制。

items.title: MoneyGram supports crypto-to-cash withdrawals for Kraken users
items.summary: The firms plan to expand this partnership beyond cash withdrawals to support local bank deposits and cross-border remittance flows.
items.title_zh: MoneyGram 支持 Kraken 用户从加密货币到现金提款
items.summary_zh: 两家公司计划将这种合作伙伴关系扩展到现金提取之外，以支持当地银行存款和跨境汇款。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
items.summary: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推进特朗普支持的终止强制性季度收益报告的提案
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 正式提议修改规则，允许公司以新表格 10-S 提交半年报，以取代传统的季度 10-Q 表格

items.title: UniCredit CEO says taking control of Commerzbank ‘not the expected scenario’
items.summary: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
items.title_zh: 联合信贷银行首席执行官表示，控制德国商业银行“不是预期的情况”
items.summary_zh: 尽管遭到德国的反对，这家意大利银行仍在向德国竞争对手德国商业银行提出收购要约。

items.title: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz won’t return to normal until August or later, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: With a lack of a breakthrough in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, traders increasingly see traffic returning to normal later and later.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什贸易商表示，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到八月或更晚才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的谈判缺乏突破，交易员越来越认为交通恢复正常的时间越来越晚。

items.title: Russian attacks kill at least 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
items.summary: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.
items.title_zh: 在基辅和莫斯科提议停火之前，俄罗斯的袭击造成至少20人死亡
items.summary_zh: 基辅表示将于5月6日开始休战，然后在莫斯科宣布暂停胜利日阅兵后“采取对称行动”。

items.title: Trump Looks for a Silver Bullet to End the Iran War. There May Be None.
items.summary: The president is trying to ratchet up the economic pressure on Tehran, but Iran’s government is unlikely to make a deal without a big, face-saving compromise.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求结束伊朗战争的灵丹妙药。可能没有。
items.summary_zh: 总统正试图加大对德黑兰的经济压力，但如果不做出重大的、保全面子的妥协，伊朗政府不太可能达成协议。

items.title: Tokenization won't disrupt banking rails but improve them, Wall Street executives say
items.summary: Executives from Citigroup, JPMorgan and DTCC said at Consensus that genuine client demand is driving real-world use of tokenized assets.
items.title_zh: 华尔街高管表示，代币化不会扰乱银行业监管，而是会改善银行业监管
items.summary_zh: 花旗集团、摩根大通和 DTCC 的高管在共识会议上表示，真正的客户需求正在推动代币化资产在现实世界的使用。

items.title: Rep. Steven Horsford pitches PARITY Act as 'durable floor' for crypto tax at Consensus Miami
items.summary: The Nevada Democrat told Professor Yesha Yadav that incremental, bipartisan reform is the path forward as Senate negotiations on the CLARITY Act stall.
items.title_zh: 众议员 Steven Horsford 在迈阿密共识会议上将 PARITY Act 视为加密税的“持久底线”
items.summary_zh: 这位内华达州民主党人告诉 Yesha Yadav 教授，随着参议院关于《清晰法案》的谈判陷入僵局，渐进的两党改革才是前进的道路。

items.title: Wall Street warns human-built markets can’t keep up with machine-speed trading
items.summary: Legacy financial systems face pressure as tokenization and real-time trading push markets toward always-on, automated infrastructure, panelists at Consensus in Miami said on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 华尔街警告人造市场无法跟上机器交易速度
items.summary_zh: 迈阿密共识会议的小组成员周二表示，随着代币化和实时交易推动市场转向永远在线的自动化基础设施，传统金融系统面临压力。

items.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse warns next two weeks are critical for crypto legislation
items.summary: The next two weeks will be pivotal in passing broader cryptocurrency legislation, says Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官布拉德·加林豪斯（Brad Garlinghouse）警告称，未来两周对于加密立法至关重要
items.summary_zh: Ripple 首席执行官布拉德·加林豪斯 (Brad Garlinghouse) 表示，未来两周对于通过更广泛的加密货币立法至关重要。

items.title: Coinbase doubles down on Centrifuge investment, taps platform as tokenization partner for Base
items.summary: Centrifuge will be the go-to platform for launching tokenized assets on Base, the Ethereum blockchain incubated by Coinbase.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 加倍加大对 Centrifuge 的投资，并利用该平台作为 Base 的代币化合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: Centrifuge 将成为在 Coinbase 孵化的以太坊区块链 Base 上推出代币化资产的首选平台。

items.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
items.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
items.title_zh: 购买 ChatGPT 广告的新方式
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过测试版自助广告管理器、每次点击费用出价和增强的测量工具扩展了 ChatGPT 广告，旨在保护隐私并将对话与广告分开。

items.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
items.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道合作重新构想 CFO 办公室
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道正在合作，帮助企业使用人工智能代理实现财务工作流程自动化、改进预测、加强控制以及实现 CFO 职能现代化。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bitcoin extends gains to $81,500 as tokenization push lifts Bullish, Galaxy, Centrifuge
items.summary: Crypto market momentum could extend further unless geopolitical risks flare up again, one analyst said.
items.title_zh: 随着代币化的推动，比特币涨幅扩大至 81,500 美元 看涨、Galaxy、Centrifuge
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，除非地缘政治风险再次爆发，否则加密市场的势头可能会进一步扩大。

items.title: Solana’s 'Alpenglow' upgrade could arrive next quarter, co-founder Yakovenko says
items.summary: Speaking at Consensus Miami 2026, the Solana co-founder said that he is excited to see 'Alpenglow' upgrade go live later this year, which could come as early as next quarter.
items.title_zh: 联合创始人 Yakovenko 表示，Solana 的“Alpenglow”升级可能会在下个季度到来
items.summary_zh: Solana 联合创始人在 2026 年迈阿密共识上发表讲话时表示，他很高兴看到“Alpenglow”升级在今年晚些时候上线，最早可能在下个季度上线。

items.title: Crypto's value is from being outside regulatory apparatus, says Arthur Hayes
items.summary: All that matters for bitcoin’s value proposition is fiat liquidity, said Arthur Hayes, CIO of Maelstrom, at Consensus Miami 2026.
items.title_zh: 亚瑟·海耶斯 (Arthur Hayes) 表示，加密货币的价值来自于监管机构之外
items.summary_zh: Maelstrom 首席信息官 Arthur Hayes 在 2026 年迈阿密共识大会上表示，对比特币价值主张最重要的是法定流动性。

items.title: State Street and Galaxy launch fund on Solana designed to ‘sweep’ stablecoins into productive vehicle
items.summary: The State Street Galaxy Onchain Liquidity Sweep Fund lets investors push stablecoins into a yield-bearing tokenized fund.
items.title_zh: 道富银行和 Galaxy 在 Solana 上推出基金，旨在将稳定币“扫荡”到生产工具中
items.summary_zh: 道富银河链上流动性周转基金允许投资者将稳定币投入有收益的代币化基金。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
items.summary: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.
items.title_zh: 英特尔和美光准备打破重大里程碑
items.summary_zh: 期权交易者无法获得足够的半导体股票。

items.title: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms give a high probability to layoffs in the tech sector reaching more than 447,000 jobs in 2026.
items.title_zh: 继Coinbase之后，预测市场交易员预测未来还会有更多科技公司裁员
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员预计，2026 年科技行业裁员人数将超过 44.7 万个。

items.title: Milken-adjacent Power100 attendees aim to reclaim the DEI in finance narrative
items.summary: Blueprint Capital's Power100 weekend convenes diverse leaders in finance ahead of the Milken Institute Global Conference.
items.title_zh: 米尔肯相邻的 Power100 与会者旨在重新夺回金融叙事中的 DEI
items.summary_zh: Blueprint Capital 的 Power100 周末在米尔肯研究所全球会议之前聚集了金融界的不同领导人。

items.title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
items.summary: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.
items.title_zh: 由于预期信贷损失增加，第一季度税前利润未达预期，汇丰股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 欧洲最大的银行汇丰银行周二公布第一季度税前利润为 94 亿美元，略低于分析师的预期。

items.title: Traders are doubtful Cohen's GameStop can pull off monster eBay acquisition
items.summary: Traders on Kalshi and Polymarket give the company just a 25% and 15% chance, respectively, of successfully buying the online marketplace.
items.title_zh: 交易员怀疑科恩的 GameStop 能否完成 eBay 的巨额收购
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 上的交易者认为该公司成功购买在线市场的机会分别只有 25% 和 15%。

items.title: Kalshi traders see April jobs report coming in better than economists' estimates
items.summary: The figure is higher than consensus estimates for 57,000 jobs gained in April, according to analysts polled by FactSet.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为四月份就业报告好于经济学家的预期
items.summary_zh: FactSet 调查的分析师称，这一数字高于 4 月份新增 57,000 个就业岗位的普遍预期。

items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织称汉坦病毒可能在游轮乘客之间传播
items.summary_zh: 船上已确诊两例这种很少在人与人之间传播的病毒病例，三人死亡。

items.title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
items.summary: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚煤矿瓦斯爆炸 9名矿工死亡
items.summary_zh: 此次爆炸是苏塔陶萨 (Sutatausa) 地区发生的最新一起事故，这里曾于 2023 年发生过另一起致命矿难。

items.title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
items.summary: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.
items.title_zh: 德国莱比锡市一辆汽车冲入人群，造成两人死亡、多人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当局称，事件发生后，一名 33 岁的德国公民被拘留。

items.title: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
items.summary: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.
items.title_zh: 罗马尼亚总理在不信任投票中下台
items.summary_zh: 伊利·博洛扬（Ilie Bolojan）在其联盟中最大的政党加入极右翼反对派罢免他之后失去了选票。

items.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
items.summary: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.
items.title_zh: 中国烟花爆竹厂爆炸已造成26人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据官方媒体报道，湖南省一家烟花厂发生爆炸，已造成 26 人死亡、61 人受伤。

items.title: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
items.summary: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.
items.title_zh: 一位“有趣”的超级巨星震惊对手并重塑印度一个邦的政治
items.summary_zh: 电影明星维杰不顾反对者的反对，几乎横扫泰米尔纳德邦民意调查，标志着政治秩序的突破。

items.title: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
items.summary: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚著名作家就剥削儿童内容认罪
items.summary_zh: 《贾斯珀·琼斯与鲁特》的作者于一月份在警方突袭其位于珀斯的家中被捕。

items.title: Rescuers among three dead after yacht sinks off Australian coast
items.summary: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.
items.title_zh: 游艇在澳大利亚海岸沉没 救援人员三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 78 岁和 62 岁的志愿者救援人员在他们的船在“危险”的条件下翻滚后死亡。

items.title: Deadly China plane crash was caused by fuel cut-off, says report
items.summary: The Boeing 737 plane crashed into a Chinese hillside in 2022, killing all 132 people on board.
items.title_zh: 报告称，致命的中国飞机失事是由于燃油切断造成的
items.summary_zh: 2022年，波音737飞机坠入中国山坡，机上132人全部遇难。

items.title: In Venezuela, Trump Vowed to Show Accountability. But Secret Oil Deals Linger.
items.summary: Trump officials and their Venezuelan allies have promised a new era of accountability to unlock Venezuela’s immense oil wealth. But the country’s oil industry remains a black hole.
items.title_zh: 在委内瑞拉，特朗普誓言要承担责任。但秘密石油交易依然存在。
items.summary_zh: 特朗普官员及其委内瑞拉盟友承诺开启问责新时代，以释放委内瑞拉巨大的石油财富。但该国的石油工业仍然是一个黑洞。

items.title: Rare Comet Appears Over New Zealand, Australia and South Africa
items.summary: Known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, the comet will be visible to stargazers using a telescope in New Zealand, Australia and South Africa.
items.title_zh: 罕见彗星出现在新西兰、澳大利亚和南非上空
items.summary_zh: 这颗被称为 C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS 的彗星将被新西兰、澳大利亚和南非的观星者使用望远镜观测到。

items.title: Modi’s Triumph in West Bengal Elections Puts Him Closer to an Opposition-Free India
items.summary: With his triumph in West Bengal state elections, Prime Minister Narendra Modi has moved closer to his dream of an opposition-free India.
items.title_zh: 莫迪在西孟加拉邦选举中的胜利使他更接近无反对派的印度
items.summary_zh: 随着西孟加拉邦选举的胜利，总理纳伦德拉·莫迪离他建立一个没有反对派的印度的梦想又近了一步。

items.title: What a Bike Ride in Cape Town Taught Me About Apartheid
items.summary: A New York Times reporter joined a group of cyclists on a route meant to break down Cape Town’s lingering racial and economic barriers.
items.title_zh: 在开普敦骑自行车让我了解了种族隔离
items.summary_zh: 《纽约时报》的一名记者加入了一群骑自行车的人，踏上了一条旨在打破开普敦挥之不去的种族和经济障碍的路线。

items.title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
items.summary: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.
items.title_zh: 台湾可以向乌克兰学习。非正式地，联系正在增长。
items.summary_zh: 两国政府没有正式的外交或军事关系。但由公司高管和志愿者领导的松散网络正在弥合部分鸿沟。

items.title: The Growing Rift Between the UAE and Saudi Arabia, Explained
items.summary: Officials say competition between the countries is healthy. But tensions are mounting over energy quotas, regional conflicts and their different visions for the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯之间日益扩大的裂痕解释
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，两国之间的竞争是健康的。但由于能源配额、地区冲突以及两国对中东的不同愿景，紧张局势正在加剧。

items.title: Cruise Ship Struck by Hantavirus Is to Head to Canary Islands, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: Spain said it would decide on a port of call only after disease experts inspected the vessel. The World Health Organization said human-to-human transmission may have played a role in the outbreak.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织 感染汉坦病毒的游轮将前往加那利群岛说
items.summary_zh: 西班牙表示，只有在疾病专家检查该船后才会决定停靠港。世界卫生组织表示，人际传播可能在此次疫情爆发中发挥了作用。

items.title: Fireworks Factory Explosion in China Kills at Least 26
items.summary: Dozens more were injured in the explosion, which appeared to be one of the country’s deadliest in recent years.
items.title_zh: 中国烟花厂爆炸造成至少26人死亡
items.summary_zh: 另有数十人在爆炸中受伤，这似乎是该国近年来最致命的爆炸之一。

items.title: Drift outlines a recovery plan for users after $295 million DPRK-linked exploit
items.summary: The lending protocol proposed tokenized claims, a revenue-backed pool and a security overhaul as it works with law enforcement to recover the stolen funds.
items.title_zh: Drift 概述了与朝鲜相关的 2.95 亿美元漏洞后用户的恢复计划
items.summary_zh: 该贷款协议在与执法部门合作追回被盗资金的同时，提出了代币化债权、收入支持池和安全改革。

items.title: Figure targets Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac in mortgage push, citing massive cost cuts for borrowers
items.summary: The firm offers rapid service, targeting the sub-$300,000 loan segment, with HELOC applications approved in 5 minutes and funding in 3 days.
items.title_zh: 该图以房利美和房地美为目标，大力推动抵押贷款，理由是借款人的成本大幅削减
items.summary_zh: 该公司提供快速服务，针对 30 万美元以下的贷款领域，HELOC 申请在 5 分钟内获得批准，并在 3 天内提供资金。

items.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse says Clarity better than chaos as Senate hits key moment
items.summary: The crypto market structure Clarity Act needs to get to its next step, a Senate hearing, this month to have a reasonable chance, Garlinghouse said.
items.title_zh: Ripple首席执行官布拉德·加林豪斯（Brad Garlinghouse）表示，参议院正值关键时刻，清晰胜于混乱
items.summary_zh: 加林豪斯表示，加密货币市场结构清晰度法案需要进入下一步，即本月举行参议院听证会，才有合理的机会。

items.title: MoonPay acquires Solana execution layer firm DFlow used by Coinbase, Phantom
items.summary: DFlow is used by both Coinbase and Phantom and has processed over $50 billion in cumulative trading volume.
items.title_zh: MoonPay 收购 Coinbase、Phantom 使用的 Solana 执行层公司 DFlow
items.summary_zh: DFlow 已被 Coinbase 和 Phantom 使用，累计交易量已超过 500 亿美元。

items.title: Google Cloud, Solana Foundation roll out new pay-as-you-go system for AI agents
items.summary: The Solana Foundation's Pay.sh provides a way for AI bots to discover, access, and pay for API usage on Google Cloud.
items.title_zh: 谷歌云和 Solana 基金会为人工智能代理推出新的即用即付系统
items.summary_zh: Solana 基金会的 Pay.sh 为 AI 机器人提供了一种发现、访问 Google Cloud 上的 API 并为其付费的方式。

items.title: IREN snaps up Mirantis in $625 million all-stock deal to round out its AI cloud platform
items.summary: Analysts say that IREN's deal implies roughly four to five times revenue valuation for privately held Mirantis.
items.title_zh: IREN 以 6.25 亿美元的全股票交易收购 Mirantis，以完善其人工智能云平台
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，IREN 的交易意味着私人持有的 Mirantis 的收入估值约为四到五倍。

items.title: Securitize taps Jump and Jupiter as it rolls out fully onchain, regulated onchain stocks
items.summary: Jump will provide institutional liquidity via its PropAMM, while Solana DeFi aggregator Jupiter will support retail and institutional access.
items.title_zh: Securitize 利用 Jump 和 Jupiter 推出完全链上、受监管的链上股票
items.summary_zh: Jump 将通过其 PropAMM 提供机构流动性，而 Solana DeFi 聚合器 Jupiter 将支持零售和机构访问。

items.title: Wormhole bridges ‘canonical’ version of Bittensor’s TAO token to Solana
items.summary: The activation is powered by Wormhole Labs’ Sunrise platform, which acts as a "day-one asset gateway" for bridging native assets.
items.title_zh: Wormhole 将 Bittensor 的 TAO 代币的“规范”版本桥接到 Solana
items.summary_zh: 该激活由 Wormhole Labs 的 Sunrise 平台提供支持，该平台充当桥接原生资产的“第一天资产网关”。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant System Card
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5即时系统卡

items.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
items.summary: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 如何大规模提供低延迟语音 AI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何重建其 WebRTC 堆栈，以低延迟、全球规模和无缝对话轮流为实时语音 AI 提供支持。

items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.title_zh: 引入高级帐户安全
items.summary_zh: 引入高级帐户安全性：防网络钓鱼登录、更强的恢复以及增强的保护措施，以保护敏感数据并防止帐户被盗用。

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.title_zh: 构建智能时代的计算基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展 Stargate 以构建支持 AGI 的计算基础设施，增加新的数据中心容量以满足不断增长的 AI 需求。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的网络安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了一个由五部分组成的行动计划，旨在加强智能时代的网络安全，重点是实现人工智能驱动的网络防御的民主化和保护关键系统。

items.title_zh: 人工智能评估正在成为新的计算瓶颈

items.title_zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 简介：适用于文档、音频和视频代理的长上下文多模态智能

items.summary_zh: Google 正在与 XPRIZE 和 Range Media Partners 合作举办价值 350 万美元的 Future Vision 电影竞赛。

items.summary: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌将通过 Kaggle 重新推出为期 5 天的人工智能代理强化课程，现已开放报名。

items.summary: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
